situation.headline: US-Iran nuclear framework emerging: 60-day sanctions waiver on Iranian oil, IAEA inspections resumed, Hormuz open — a de facto interim deal with transformative energy and regional security implications

domains.name: Middle East
domains.label: regional escalation 90d
domains.status: US-Iran diplomatic momentum is real — Vance Switzerland talks, IAEA access restored, Hormuz open, $12B asset release, Rubio Gulf tour — but Mossad regime-change planning, Israeli refusal to withdraw from Lebanon, and ongoing IDF ceasefire violations are structural escalation risks that could torpedo the deal.

domains.name: Indo-Pacific
domains.label: China coercion escalation
domains.status: China expanding maritime survey operations east of Taiwan, PLA footage shows active interference with Japanese and Taiwanese vessels, and a US shipyard study confirms inability to repair battle-damaged vessels in a China war scenario — coercion is intensifying while US naval readiness is publicly questioned.

domains.name: Europe
domains.label: NATO cohesion fracture
domains.status: Starmer's imminent exit and Burnham's near-certain succession at 95% on Kalshi introduces a new UK variable, but Burnham's stated Israel-first foreign policy signals continuity on core NATO posture; the deeper fracture risk remains US political instability rather than European defection.

domains.name: Energy
domains.label: supply shock 60d
domains.status: Iranian oil sanctions waiver through August 21 plus open Hormuz Strait has already driven oil prices down 4%; Qatar Ras Laffan explosion was accidental with exports unaffected, and the 60-day window creates a supply glut risk rather than a shock, barring deal collapse.

domains.name: US Politics
domains.label: House flip Nov 2026
domains.status: Trump approval at 30% in shock polling, Tucker Carlson and MTG departing Republican Party, MAGA stars reportedly alarmed by their own movement, Trump resignation market at 21% after a 4-cent drop, and Vance 2028 nomination at 41% all signal a fracturing right coalition heading into midterms.

situation.unseen: The simultaneous Iran diplomatic opening and Russian strategic bomber shelter hardening at Engels-2 are not unrelated: Moscow is watching the US-Iran deal reduce Gulf tension and free up US strategic bandwidth, and is accelerating nuclear-capable bomber protection as a hedge — the Iran deal may inadvertently signal to Russia that US attention is shifting, compressing the window for Ukraine leverage before Washington deprioritizes the theater.
situation.criticalWindow: The 60-day Iranian oil sanctions waiver expires August 21, 2026 — the entire US-Iran nuclear framework depends on whether a durable agreement can be codified before that deadline, and Israel's Mossad regime-change planning plus ongoing Lebanon ceasefire violations could generate a provocation that collapses negotiations before August, forcing a binary choice between the deal and the US-Israel relationship.
watchFor: Israeli kinetic action against Iran or Iranian proxies that forces Tehran to suspend IAEA cooperation and exit the framework before August 21

Tucker Carlson formally announcing a 2028 presidential run — Kalshi shows the running market collapsed 29 cents in 24 hours, suggesting recent statements are being read as disqualifying rather than launching
PLA escalation in Taiwan Strait surveys converting to interdiction of Taiwanese or Japanese vessels, triggering a US response obligation test
Second-order effect of Iranian oil re-entering global markets suppressing Gulf state revenues and destabilizing US partners in UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait — exactly the countries Rubio is visiting
situation.confidenceNote: Key uncertainties: Trump approval figure of 30% is from a single unnamed poll and may be an outlier; the Iran deal details remain opaque — IAEA inspection scope and enrichment caps are unconfirmed; Burnham succession is near-certain per markets but UK Labour internal dynamics could still produce a surprise; the AGM-188 Rusty Dagger strike on the Voronezh semiconductor plant is unverified and if confirmed represents a significant escalation in US-authorized Ukrainian deep strikes that could trigger Russian escalation ladder climbing.
situation.topPattern: The dominant signal is a US grand bargain attempt — trade Iranian oil market access and sanctions relief for nuclear transparency and Hormuz stability — while simultaneously the domestic political coalition enabling that bargain (Trump at 30% approval, MAGA fracturing, Tucker and MTG exiting the GOP) is visibly eroding, creating a closing window in which the deal can be concluded before domestic political collapse removes the executive authority to enforce it; Kalshi's Vance 2028 at 41% and Rubio at 29% reflect market uncertainty about who inherits the foreign policy posture.

signals.headline: US lifts Iran oil sanctions for 60 days; IAEA inspections resume
signals.summary: Treasury issued 60-day waiver on Iranian crude oil exports through August 21, 2026. Iran's Parliament Speaker confirmed $12B in frozen assets unfrozen in Switzerland. VP Vance announced IAEA inspector access restored for first time since July 2025, citing progress on Strait of Hormuz access and nuclear deal framework.
signals.signal: Trump administration has fundamentally reversed maximum-pressure posture toward Iran without securing comprehensive agreement—mirrors Obama JCPOA structure but with weaker leverage baseline. Oil prices fell 4% on reopened supply. Iran-Oman talks on joint Strait management suggest Tehran negotiating alternative power arrangement independent of US. Risk: sanctions relief locks in without durable inspection/weaponization constraints.
signals.contradicts: Trump's 2018 rationale for exiting JCPOA; current approach replicates Obama framework Trump publicly scorned

signals.headline: Andy Burnham prediction market at 95% for next UK PM; Tucker Carlson and MTG abandon Republican Party
signals.summary: Kalshi markets price Burnham at 95% probability to replace Keir Starmer. Simultaneously, Tucker Carlson publicly states refusal to support GOP ('political party not loyal to US'), and MTG follows Carlson in departure. Burnham sworn in as MP; Starmer described as '6th PM in 7 years.'
signals.signal: Conservative-aligned personalities defecting from GOP in same cycle UK Labour faces existential succession crisis signals weakness in traditional center-right coalitions transatlantically. Turnbull-era institutional dissolution spreading. US intelligence must reassess UK government stability and Burnham's foreign policy orientation (pledged Israel as first overseas visit).
signals.contradicts: Assumption of stable Republican Party institutional coherence; assumption of UK Labour hegemony post-2024

signals.headline: IDF violates Lebanon ceasefire with shelling; Hezbollah sustains drone operations against Israeli armor
signals.summary: IDF shelled southern Lebanon towns (first ceasefire violation in 37 hours). Hezbollah released June 2026 footage of Ababil fiber-optic FPV drone strike on IDF Achzarit APC at Al-Hamames Hill. Israeli official told i24 no planned withdrawal from Southern Lebanon.
signals.signal: Lebanon ceasefire framework disintegrating under operational pressure. Hezbollah retaining advanced drone strike capability and willingness to publish targeting. Israeli occupation posture hardens despite nominal truce. Suggests US diplomatic win (via Vance Iran talks) may be offset by renewed Israeli-Hezbollah escalation, weakening regional de-escalation narrative.
signals.contradicts: Vance statement that Lebanon coordination advanced in Switzerland talks

signals.headline: China expanding maritime surveys east of Taiwan; US battlefield repair study shows critical vulnerabilities
signals.summary: China conducting expanded maritime surveys east of Taiwan amid research vessel incidents with Japanese aircraft and Taiwan authority vessels. Military Times reports US could not repair battle-damaged ships in hypothetical China war scenario.
signals.signal: China operationalizing incremental boundary pressure in Taiwan strait while US logistical asymmetry in extended Pacific conflict worsens. Damage control infrastructure gap creates decisive operational disadvantage in contested waters. Taiwan contingency planning assumptions require urgent revision.
signals.contradicts: US military readiness assessments assuming adequate wartime repair capacity in Indo-Pacific theater

signals.headline: Qatar Ras Laffan gas facility explosion kills 13, injures 66; export capability unaffected
signals.summary: Accidental explosion at Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG site caused 13 deaths, 66 injuries. Doha confirmed export operations unimpeded. Incident occurred as US-Iran oil sanctions waiver opens new global supply sources.
signals.signal: Global LNG supply chain reasserts operational fragility; Qatar reputational cost manageable given UAE/Bahrain proximity in Rubio's scheduled diplomatic tour. Iran's return to oil markets reduces Qatar's leverage in energy-constrained Europe/Asia pricing.

signals.headline: Trump approval at 30%; prediction markets show J.D. Vance 18% general election probability vs Marco Rubio 16%
signals.summary: Drudge reports 30% Trump approval. Kalshi shows Vance at 18% win probability and 41% nomination probability (down 1 cent 24h). Rubio nomination at 29%, general election win at 16%. Trump resign market at 21% (down 4 cents).
signals.signal: Vance emerging as preferred Republican successor over Rubio despite Iran deal optics controversy. Low absolute approval but stable resignation odds suggest Party discipline holding. 2028 field remains unsettled; Newsom (23% Dem nomination) plurality lead fragile.
signals.contradicts: Narrative of Trump commanding unified party loyalty

signals.headline: Russia hardening strategic bomber shelters at Engels-2; Ukraine strikes Russian fuel/logistics hubs with US AGM-188 LACM
signals.summary: Satellite imagery shows large-scale Hardened Aircraft Shelter construction for Tu-95MS and Tu-160 strategic bombers at Engels-2 in Saratov Oblast. Ukrainian forces struck Voronezh semiconductor plant with F-16-launched AGM-188 Rusty Dagger cruise missiles; Donetsk fuel tanker destroyed by drone.
signals.signal: Russia prioritizing survivability of long-range strike capability while rear-area logistics degradation accelerates. Ukraine operating US AGM-188 LACM operationally suggests tech transfer mature. Russian air force decentralization ongoing. NATO supply sustainability to Ukraine remains asymmetrically stressed vs. Russian repair capacity.

scanNote: Signal quality degraded by sensationalist Drudge mix (Clive Davis obituary, SUV deaths, herpes allegation crowd out geopolitical substance); core OSINT/market data validates Iran reversal, UK succession crisis, and Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire fracture as primary intelligence vectors.

markets.label: Andy Burnham next UK PM
markets.rationale: Burnham has been sworn in as MP and markets price him at 95%; Starmer's political collapse ('6th PM in 7 years' framing) and Burnham's declared Israel visit signal a near-certain transition, with Angela Rayner spiking 9 cents as the only credible alternative risk.

markets.label: Angela Rayner next UK PM
markets.rationale: Rayner's 9-cent 24h spike is the largest percentage move among UK PM candidates and represents residual risk if Burnham faces internal Labour resistance, but her path remains narrow given Burnham's momentum.

markets.label: Vance 2028 GOP nominee
markets.rationale: Vance returned from successful Iran talks in Switzerland and is the incumbent VP, strengthening his 2028 positioning, but Tucker Carlson's public break from the GOP and MTG's defection signal a fracturing MAGA coalition that could complicate Vance's path.

markets.label: Rubio 2028 GOP nominee
markets.rationale: Rubio is conducting a high-profile Middle East diplomatic tour following the Iran breakthrough and a 30% Trump approval creates a succession opening; his foreign policy profile positions him as the establishment alternative to Vance.

markets.label: Trump resigns before term ends
markets.rationale: A shock 30% approval poll, MTG and Carlson leaving the Republican Party, and Supreme Court tensions are meaningful political stress signals, but historically low approval and factional defections are insufficient predictors of resignation given Trump's documented pattern of political resilience.

markets.label: Newsom 2028 Dem nominee
markets.rationale: Newsom remains the highest-profile Democrat but the intel cycle shows Jon Ossoff gaining traction in both nomination and general markets while Newsom's California-specific vulnerabilities persist in a low-Trump-approval environment that scrambles Dem field dynamics.

markets.label: Ossoff 2028 Dem nominee
markets.rationale: Ossoff shows the most consistent positive movement across both nomination and general election markets and represents the emerging centrist-lane candidate, but the 2028 field is structurally too uncertain at this horizon for high confidence.

markets.label: Tucker Carlson runs for GOP nomination
markets.rationale: Carlson's explicit public statement that he will never support the Republican Party combined with a 29-cent collapse in the running market makes a formal GOP candidacy highly unlikely; a third-party or independent run is more plausible but resolves this market NO.

watchSignals: UK Prime Minister succession: Andy Burnham at 95% prediction-market probability signals imminent transition from Keir Starmer; watch parliamentary votes and Labour party formalization within 7-10 days

Iran nuclear-sanctions thaw: 60-day US Treasury waiver on Iranian oil through August 21 combined with IAEA inspector re-entry represents major shift in Trump administration posture; monitor oil price impacts, OPEC response, and Israeli reaction to potential strategic realignment

Ukraine-Russia intensity escalation: Concurrent Ukrainian F-16 strikes on Russian semiconductor plants, Russian hardened aircraft shelter construction, and ongoing Crimea/southern Russia raids suggest preparing for sustained high-intensity conflict; watch Russian counter-escalation and NATO weapons supply decisions

Israel-Lebanon ceasefire fragility: IDF shelling violations within 37 hours of reported ceasefire indicate potential breakdown; monitor Hezbollah response tempo and US diplomatic intervention efforts over next 2 weeks

Republican Party internal fracture: Tucker Carlson public departure and Marjorie Taylor Greene following signals Trump-aligned MAGA faction distancing from institutional GOP; watch 2028 primary market consolidation and third-party formation risk

China Taiwan maritime pressure campaign: Expanded surveys east of Taiwan and research vessel interference with Japanese/Taiwanese assets indicate incremental salami-slicing; monitor US carrier deployment responses and allied coordination announcements

groundTruth.headline: US and Iran finalized 60-day sanctions waiver on crude oil and resumption of IAEA inspections following Switzerland talks led by VP Vance
groundTruth.summary: Treasury issued binding waiver through August 21 allowing Iran to sell oil globally; Iranian Parliament Speaker confirmed $12B frozen asset release; IAEA inspectors returning for first time since July 2025. This represents tactical reversal of Trump's 2018 maximum-pressure stance and signals potential nuclear deal framework progression.
groundTruth.signal: Reduces near-term Iran conflict risk but creates strategic ambiguity on whether inspection compliance will hold; impacts global oil prices and tests Israel's tolerance for US-Iran accommodation; 60-day window is critical negotiation period for broader agreement

groundTruth.headline: Keir Starmer positioned for imminent removal as Andy Burnham consolidates 95% prediction-market probability as next Prime Minister
groundTruth.summary: OSINT feed reports Andy Burnham sworn in as MP and likely successor; sixth prime minister in seven years signals UK political instability. This follows historic Labour government collapse comparable to Conservative chaos 2022-2024.
groundTruth.signal: UK alliance stability questioned; NATO burden-sharing commitments at risk if domestic focus turns inward; potential UK-Israel policy realignment if Burnham (who pledged Israel as first visit) implements stated priorities

groundTruth.headline: Ukraine conducting sustained air strikes on Russian rear-area military and industrial targets including semiconductor plants and oil terminals; Russia simultaneously hardening strategic bomber bases
groundTruth.summary: Ukrainian F-16 AGM-188 cruise missile strikes hit Voronezh semiconductor plant; concurrent attacks on Grushova Balka oil terminal in Novorossiysk; Russian satellite imagery shows large-scale HAS construction for Tu-95MS and Tu-160 bombers at Engels-2. Both sides preparing for prolonged high-intensity conflict.
groundTruth.signal: Long-term logistics attrition strategy by Ukraine vs Russian strategic force hardening indicates multi-month conflict trajectory; US must sustain advanced munitions pipeline; risk of Russian asymmetric escalation (NATO territory targeting) if attrition reaches critical thresholds

groundTruth.headline: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire showing early violation signals with IDF shelling of southern towns within 37 hours; Hezbollah publishing FPV drone targeting footage dated June 2026
groundTruth.summary: IDF shelled Masha'a al-Mansouri and Byout al-Siyad; concurrent Hezbollah drone footage of Achzarit APC engagement at Al-Hamames Hill suggests both sides maintaining operational readiness. Israeli official stated no planned force withdrawal from Southern Lebanon.
groundTruth.signal: Ceasefire framework unstable; US diplomatic efforts under Secretary Rubio's Middle East tour may face rapid deterioration; risk of renewed major conflict within 2-4 weeks if trigger incidents escalate

groundTruth.headline: Tucker Carlson and Marjorie Taylor Greene publicly exited Republican Party; Carlson stated 35-year GOP affiliation ended over party disloyalty to US interests
groundTruth.summary: Carlson declared active rejection of Republican party structure despite lifetime affiliation; Greene followed with 'America Last' rhetoric signaling MAGA faction fracture from institutional GOP. Prediction markets show Tucker Carlson 2028 presidential run at only 5% despite media platform.
groundTruth.signal: Indicates Trump movement may splinter into parallel political structure; threatens traditional conservative coalition ahead of 2028; potential for third-party candidacy drawing right-populist vote and fragmenting anti-Democratic opposition
